sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 로빈후드는 2025년 연간 매출 45억 달러와 순예치금 680억 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 연간 매출 45억 달러 및 희석 주당순이익(EPS) 2.05달러로 사상 최대 실적을 기록했습니다.
연간 순예치금 680억 달러를 달성하고 로빈후드 골드 구독자 수가 420만 명에 도달하며 성장세를 이어갔습니다.

businessChanges.text: 로빈후드 골드 구독자 수가 전년 대비 58% 증가한 420만 명을 기록하며 구독 서비스 부문이 강화되었습니다.
총 플랫폼 자산은 순예치금 유입과 자산 가치 상승에 힘입어 전년 대비 68% 증가한 3,240억 달러를 기록했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 총 순매출은 전년 동기 대비 27% 증가한 12억 8,000만 달러를 기록했습니다.
4분기 운영 비용은 마케팅 및 성장 투자 확대로 인해 전년 동기 대비 38% 증가한 6억 3,300만 달러를 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 마케팅 및 성장 투자 확대에 따른 운영 비용 증가가 향후 수익성 개선에 미칠 영향과 지속적인 고객 확보 추이를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q42025robinhoodexhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Robinhood Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results Record Revenues of $4.5 billion in 2025, including a record $1.28 billion in Q4 Record Diluted EPS of $2.05 in 2025, including $0.66 in Q4 Record Net Deposits of $68 billion in 2025, including $16 billion in Q4 Robinhood Gold Subscribers reached a record 4.2 million MENLO PARK, Calif. – February 10, 2026 – Robinhood Markets, Inc. (“Robinhood”) (NASDAQ: HOOD) today announced financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, which ended December 31, 2025. “Our vision hasn’t changed: we are building the Financial SuperApp,” said Vlad Tenev, Chairman and CEO of Robinhood. “2025 was a record year where we set new highs for net d  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.5 billion = 45억 달러; $1.28 billion = 12억 8,000만 달러; $68 billion = 680억 달러; $16 billion = 160억 달러; 4.2 million = 420만 달러; $4.5 = 4.5달러; $1.28 = 1.28달러; $2.05 = 2.05달러; $68 = 68달러; $0.66 = 0.66달러; $16 = 16달러.

ial Officer of Robinhood. “2026 is off to a strong start, and we are incredibly excited about our plan and momentum for the year ahead as we focus on shipping great products for customers and driving profitable growth for shareholders.” Fourth Quarter Results • Total net revenues increased 27% year-over-year to $1.28 billion. ◦ Transaction-based revenues increased 15% year-over-year to $776 million, primarily driven by other transaction revenue of $147 million, up over 300%, options revenue of $314 million, up 41%, and equities revenue of $94 million, up 54%, partially offset by cryptocurrencies revenue of $221 million, down 38% . ◦ Net interest revenues increased  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.28 billion = 12억 8,000만 달러; $776 million = 7억 7,600만 달러; $147 million = 1억 4,700만 달러; $314 million = 3억 1,400만 달러; $94 million = 9,400만 달러; $221 million = 2억 2,100만 달러; $411 million = 4억 1,100만 달러; $1.28 = 1.28달러; $147 = 147달러; $776 = 776달러; $314 = 314달러; $94 = 94달러; $221 = 221달러; $411 = 411달러.

$96 million, primarily driven by Robinhood Gold subscription revenue of $50 million, up 56% . • Net income was $605 million, which compares to $916 million in Q4 2024 that included a $424 million benefit from the Q4 2024 Tax Benefit and Regulatory Accrual Reversal. • Diluted earnings per share (“EPS”) was $0.66, which compares to $1.01 in Q4 2024 that included a $0.47 benefit from the Q4 2024 Tax Benefit and Regulatory Accrual Reversal. • Total operating expenses increased 38% year-over-year to $633 million. The year-over-year increase was primarily driven by marketing and growth investments, and acquisition-related expenses. ◦ Adjusted Op  Normalized numeric aliases: $96 million = 9,600만 달러; $50 million = 5,000만 달러; $605 million = 6억 500만 달러; $916 million = 9억 1,600만 달러; $424 million = 4억 2,400만 달러; $633 million = 6억 3,300만 달러; $597 million = 5억 9,700만 달러; $761 million = 7억 6,100만 달러; $96 = 96달러; $0.66 = 0.66달러; $761 = 761달러; $1.01 = 1.01달러; $0.47 = 0.47달러; $633 = 633달러; $597 = 597달러.

to 27.0 million. ◦ Investment Accounts increased by 2.2 million, or 8%, year-over-year to 28.4 million. • Total Platform Assets increased 68% year-over-year to $324 billion, driven by continued Net Deposits, acquired assets, and higher equity valuations. • Net Deposits were $15.9 billion, an annualized growth rate of 19% relative to Total Platform Assets at the end of Q3 2025. Over the past twelve months, Net Deposits were $68.1 billion, a growth rate of 35% relative to Total Platform Assets at the end of Q4 2024. • Robinhood Gold Subscribers increased by 1.5 million, or 58%, year-over-year to 4.2 million. • Average Revenue Per User (“ARPU”) increased 16%   Normalized numeric aliases: 27.0 million = 2,700만 달러; 2.2 million = 220만 달러; 28.4 million = 2,840만 달러; $324 billion = 3,240억 달러; $15.9 billion = 159억 달러; $68.1 billion = 681억 달러; 1.5 million = 150만 달러; 4.2 million = 420만 달러; $100 million = 1억 달러; $191 = 191달러; $324 = 324달러; $15.9 = 15.9달러; $68.1 = 68.1달러; $4.3 = 4.3달러; $100 = 100달러.
